banner.title: Open Document Request
banner.pendingItems: {{n}} item(s) pending from the request maker — submission is blocked until resolved

raiseDialog.title: Request Additional Documents
raiseDialog.subtitle: Specify the documents needed from the request maker
raiseDialog.notesPlaceholder: Describe what is needed and why...

uploadDialog.title: Upload Document
uploadDialog.deferredNotePre: The file is uploaded to storage now but
uploadDialog.deferredNotePost: attached to the request yet. Attachments happen atomically when you click

cancelReasonModal.cancelReasonSubtitle: Please provide a reason for cancellation.

declineModal.title: Decline Document Request
declineModal.reasonRequired: A reason is required to decline this request.

bulkDeclineModal.title: Decline All Remaining
bulkDeclineModal.reasonRequired: A reason is required to decline all requests.
bulkDeclineModal.reasonPlaceholder: Enter reason for declining all remaining requests...

page.title: Provide Additional Documents
page.infoTitle: The checker has requested additional documents.
page.infoBody: Please provide or decline each requested document below. The checker's task will proceed once all items are resolved.
page.uploadUnavailableTitle: Request context not available — cannot upload.
page.allStagedBanner: All pending requests have a file staged. Submit Response to send them.
page.allResolvedBanner: All document requests have been resolved.
page.stageHint: Stage a file (or decline) for every pending item to enable submit.
page.checklistHint: Read-only view of documents already attached to the request. Staged files above are attached atomically when you click Submit Response.
page.loadErrorDetail: This task may no longer be active.
page.confirmSubmitMessage: Submit your response to the checker? This will mark all items as resolved and allow the checker to proceed.

toasts.submitAlreadyDone: This followup has already been submitted.
toasts.submitItemsRequired: All items must be provided or declined before submitting.
toasts.bulkDeclineFailed: Failed to decline some items. Please try again.
toasts.fileChooseRequired: Please choose a file to upload.
toasts.fileStaged: File staged. It will be attached when you submit.

validation.atLeastOneItem: At least one document request is required
